expectations.evidence: "the atlassian-rest skill, specifically the Capture Tasks from Meeting Notes workflow (workflows/capture-tasks-from-meeting-notes.md)"

expectations.text: Extracts at least 4 action items from the notes
expectations.evidence: Extracted 5 action items: Sarah (payment integration), Mike (CI pipeline), Lisa (API docs), Unassigned (deployment runbook), John (memory leak).

expectations.text: Identifies Sarah, Mike, and Lisa as assignees
expectations.evidence: All three identified in the extraction table and lookup commands: "jira.mjs lookup-user "Sarah"", "jira.mjs lookup-user "Mike"", "jira.mjs lookup-user "Lisa"".

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs lookup-user for each unique assignee
expectations.evidence: Step 4 shows lookup-user calls for Sarah, Mike, Lisa, and John.

expectations.text: Presents a table or list of extracted tasks for user confirmation before creating
expectations.evidence: Step 5: Presents a confirmation table with columns: #, Assignee, Summary, Priority, Due Date. States "Do not proceed until explicit confirmation."

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs create for each confirmed task with --parent or appropriate flags
expectations.evidence: Step 6 shows 5 separate jira.mjs create commands with --project DO --type Task --summary --description --assignee --priority flags for each task.
"references/action-item-patterns.md -- Used extraction patterns for name/priority/due date parsing" and "references/ticket-writing-guide.md -- Applied 'Verb + Object + Context' summary format".
